'''fachogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceasefire|ceasefire]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceasefire|ceasefire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fachogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæchegeth|fæchegeth]] || [[word:fæchegej|fæchegej]] || [[word:fæchegesh|fæchegesh]] || [[word:fæchege|fæchege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fachochogoth|fachochogoth]] || [[word:fachochogoj|fachochogoj]] || [[word:fachochogosh|fachochogosh]] || [[word:fachochogo|fachochogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fachogoth|fachogoth]] || [[word:fachogoj|fachogoj]] || [[word:fachogosh|fachogosh]] || [[word:fachogo|fachogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fachofgoth|fachofgoth]] || [[word:fachofgoj|fachofgoj]] || [[word:fachofgosh|fachofgosh]] || [[word:fachofgof|fachofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fachogotho|fachogotho]] || [[word:fachogojo|fachogojo]] || [[word:fachogosho|fachogosho]] || [[word:fachogoko|fachogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fachogoth|fachogoth]] || [[word:fachogoj|fachogoj]] || [[word:fachogosh|fachogosh]] || [[word:fachogo|fachogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fachogothol|fachogothol]] || [[word:fachogojol|fachogojol]] || [[word:fachogoshol|fachogoshol]] || [[word:fachogokol|fachogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fachogothotho|fachogothotho]] || [[word:fachogojojo|fachogojojo]] || [[word:fachogoshosho|fachogoshosho]] || [[word:fachogoko|fachogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fachogothon|fachogothon]] || [[word:fachogojon|fachogojon]] || [[word:fachogoshon|fachogoshon]] || [[word:fachogokon|fachogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fachogothoro|fachogothoro]] || [[word:fachogojoro|fachogojoro]] || [[word:fachogoshoro|fachogoshoro]] || [[word:fachogokoro|fachogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
